visualizerParams.title: Sum of Factorial Digits
visualizerParams.description: Calculate the sum of the digits in the factorial of a given number.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
from math import factorial


def solution(num: int = 100) -> int:
    """Returns the sum of the digits in the factorial of num
    >>> solution(100)
    648
    """
    # Calculate factorial and convert to string to iterate over digits
    return sum(int(x) for x in str(factorial(num)))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    n = int(input("Enter the Number: ").strip())
    print(solution(n))
visualizerParams.finalCode:
from math import factorial


def solution(num: int = 100) -> int:
    """Returns the sum of the digits in the factorial of num
    >>> solution(100)
    648
    """
    # Calculate factorial and convert to string to iterate over digits
    return sum(int(x) for x in str(factorial(num)))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    n = int(input("Enter the Number: ").strip())
    print(solution(n))
